Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
254 
NCH_IP_TOT_DDCTN_AMT 
LABEL: 
NCH Inpatient (or other Part A) Total Deductible/Coinsurance Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The total of all Part A and blood deductibles and coinsurance amounts on the claim. 
SHORT NAME: TDEDAMT 
LONG NAME: NCH_IP_TOT_DDCTN_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
NCH QA Process 
VALUES: 
XXX.XX 
COMMENT: 
Derivation Rules: Accumulate the value
